title: Verify trial widget displays correctly on homepage for Day 0-1 users
description: Test that the persistent high-visibility trial widget appears on homepage for users in first 2 days of trial with correct copy and icon
preconditions: User has active trial (Day 0 or Day 1)

steps.description: 1. Log in with user having active trial

expected_result: Widget displays with shield/clock icon, shows 'Trial Mode: X Days Remaining' and 'Manage Control Center →' link
